plan.sketch: Spike: define a deterministic value-signal derivable purely from existing persisted iteration transitions (reject/accept counts per workstream, accept->redo cycles, iterations-per-workstream, gate-friction) - no new counters in the hot path.

Slice: a read-only 'lume value' report (or extend 'lume status') computing reject-rate and gate-friction from persisted transition history; dates via the existing clock seam; deterministic and offline.
Chore: document the measured baseline in README/docs to replace anecdotal 'net positive' phrasing with an evidenced [E] figure, wired into the doc-freshness guard so it cannot drift.

workstream.title: Capture the value signal: reject-rate and gate-friction from lume's own state
